decisions.rationale: Distinct momentum-pullback setup: scanner-driven surge, explicit MACD divergence reject filter, entry on break of pullback-candle high, target prior HOD. Entry mechanic (break of pullback-candle high) differs from cand_2e70 (first new-high vs previous candle).
Source explicitly states exit and position management rules are not mechanically specified. VWAP breakout entry and daily trend filter are defined; remaining rules needed for testability.
Unique narrow-state MA convergence breakout with 20-MA pullback halt and color-change reversal bar filter. Conceptually distinct from all other candidates; no material overlap.
Calendar-based macro entry with no stop-loss, trend filter, invalidation rule, or exit logic beyond the fixed sell date. Does not fit any price-action family; classified as other.

News-catalyst-driven pullback with distinct entry mechanic: bottoms-out check (does not revert to pre-surge level), then first candle making new high vs previous candle (not pullback-candle high). Exit on prior HOD or first red candle. No material overlap with cand_d382 despite structural similarity.

Earnings-gap-ATH entry with multi-day EMA pullback, layered position sizing (starter + add on daily break), scaling out, and trailing via 80 EMA. Distinct from other news/pullback candidates in both time horizon and execution rules.

Distinct VWAP setup: price extends from VWAP, pulls back to it, requires a specific bullish signal bar (hammer/engulfing) at VWAP for entry. Different mechanic from cand_c3f which enters on closing price crossing above VWAP (breakout, not pullback).

Opening range breakout with confirmation candle is defined, but risk-to-reward targets (1:2/1:3/1:4) require user-supplied risk amount and the 9-MA stop placement rule references an undefined MA period source.
